name: Open Source Compliance
text: The Service Provider shall ensure that no open-source software components are incorporated into the Deliverables in a manner that would: (a) require disclosure of the Client's proprietary source code; (b) impose restrictions on the commercial use or distribution of the Deliverables; or (c) create obligations inconsistent with the terms of this Agreement. The Service Provider shall maintain a written inventory of all open-source components used and shall promptly notify the Client of any open-source components incorporated into the Deliverables, including the applicable open-source licence terms.
invalid_if: Open-source components used under GPL or AGPL licences without Client consent
Failure to disclose open-source components incorporated into proprietary deliverables
title: Open Source Compliance
